highlights.text: Burj Khalifa & Dubai Mall luxury city experience
Intimate desert safari with private BBQ under the stars
Private sunset yacht cruise & couple's spa retreat

itinerary.title: Romantic Dubai Honeymoon
itinerary.tagline: Dubai • Burj Khalifa • Desert Safari • Palm Jumeirah • Yacht Cruise
itinerary.overview: Begin your life together in the golden city of dreams with this TRAGUIN curated honeymoon. From private yacht sunsets to intimate desert dining, this romantic Dubai holiday promises unforgettable memories, breathtaking landscapes, and exclusive experiences.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Dubai honeymoon package (UAE-003): Burj Khalifa, desert romance, private yacht cruise, and couple's spa retreat.

days.title: Arrival in Dubai
days.description: A romantic welcome to the City of Gold. Your private TRAGUIN transfer will escort you to your handpicked hotel. Enjoy a quiet evening admiring the scenic beauty of the Dubai Marina.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private transfer
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: City Luxury & Burj Khalifa
days.description: Explore the heights of luxury. Visit the Burj Khalifa and indulge in high-end shopping at the Dubai Mall. A curated experience to admire the city's iconic attractions.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall luxury experience

days.title: Desert Romance
days.description: Experience an intimate desert safari. Enjoy dune bashing, camel rides, and a private BBQ dinner under the stars — an exclusive experience for couples seeking breathtaking landscapes.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Intimate desert safari, dune bashing, private BBQ dinner
Meals Included: Breakfast & Private Desert BBQ Dinner

days.title: Yacht Cruise & Relaxation
days.description: A private sunset yacht cruise, offering scenic beauty of the Dubai skyline. Spend your day enjoying premium stays and relaxation in the lap of luxury.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private sunset yacht cruise

days.title: Leisure & Spa
days.description: Indulge in a couple's spa retreat. Reflect on your unforgettable memories in Dubai with an evening at a world-class restaurant.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final breakfast and souvenir shopping before your TRAGUIN assisted transfer, concluding your premium Dubai experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport transfer, souvenir shopping time

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in handpicked ultra-luxury couple hotel in Dubai
Burj Khalifa and Dubai Mall luxury city experience
Intimate desert safari with private BBQ dinner under the stars
International airfare and UAE entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
